name: playwright-framework
description: Enterprise Playwright Test Automation Framework with POM

scripts.clean:reports: rimraf reports/allure-report reports/allure-results && mkdirp reports/allure-report reports/allure-results
scripts.allure:generate: rimraf reports/allure-report && npx allure-commandline generate reports/allure-results -o reports/allure-report --clean --single-file
scripts.posttest: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test: npm run clean:reports && (npx playwright test || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:ui: npm run clean:reports && (npx playwright test tests/ui || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:api: npm run clean:reports && (npx playwright test tests/api || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:hybrid: npm run clean:reports && (npx playwright test tests/hybrid || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:regression: npm run clean:reports && (npx playwright test || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:ui:chromium: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=local npx playwright test tests/ui --project=chromium --headed || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:ui:firefox: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=local npx playwright test tests/ui --project=firefox --headed || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:ui:webkit: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=local npx playwright test tests/ui --project=webkit --headed || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:ui:chromium:staging: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=staging npx playwright test tests/ui --project=chromium --headed || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:ui:firefox:staging: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=staging npx playwright test tests/ui --project=firefox --headed || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest

scripts.test:ui:chromium:production: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=production npx playwright test tests/ui --project=chromium --headed || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest

scripts.test:ui:webkit:production: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=production npx playwright test tests/ui --project=webkit --headed || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:api:chromium: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=local npx playwright test tests/api --project=chromium || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:api:firefox: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=local npx playwright test tests/api --project=firefox || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:api:webkit: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=local npx playwright test tests/api --project=webkit || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:api:chromium:staging: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=staging npx playwright test tests/api --project=chromium || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:api:firefox:staging: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=staging npx playwright test tests/api --project=firefox || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest

scripts.test:hybrid:chromium: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=local npx playwright test tests/hybrid --project=chromium --headed || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
scripts.test:hybrid:firefox: npm run clean:reports && (cross-env ENV=local npx playwright test tests/hybrid --project=firefox --headed || echo Tests failed but continuing...) && npm run posttest
